column5: Dark brown, frilly seaweed drapes across wet, pink-hued coastal rocks and smooth, rounded pebbles in an intertidal zone.
A seagull stands on a dark wooden boardwalk next to a small, pale starfish.
A yellowish-gold fish with a long, dark, hook-shaped leech parasite attached to its side.
A close-up of a person's fingers holding a small, hollow acorn cap filled with a frothy, bubbly liquid.
A glossy, dark brown flatworm is wrapped around a small, coiled snail shell on a rough, rocky surface.
An underwater photograph of a large orange sea anemone consuming a black and white sunfish on a sandy seabed.
Wet, dark brown feather boa kelp with small bulbous floats is draped across glistening, pink-algae-covered rocks and smooth grey stones in a tide pool.
A seagull stands on a wooden dock, looking down at a small starfish on the ground.
A small, yellowish-pink fish in shallow water with a dark, hook-shaped parasite attached to its side against a plain white background.
A close-up of a person's hand holding a small, brown acorn cup covered with a sticky, bubbly liquid secretion.
A glossy, dark brown flatworm crawls across a rough stone surface with a small, coiled snail shell resting on its body.
An orange and pink sea anemone on a sandy seabed grips a large, flat white fish with a dark face and a prominent eye.
A dark blue-black flatworm wraps tightly around a brown slug on a sandy, mossy rock surface.
A close-up shot of a dead insect infected with white fungus, clinging to the underside of a vibrant green leaf with its wings spread open.
A reddish-brown sea cucumber rests in shallow water on a wet sandy beach, with the leg of a nearby bird visible on the left.
An underwater close-up of a ruffled, patterned flatworm crawling over a colony of translucent, tube-like sea squirts with bright orange rims.
A pale, translucent millipede with white-fringed segments curls into a C-shape around a green sprig against a dark background.
An extreme close-up shot of a rough, porous rock with an iridescent metallic sheen, covered in fine, dusty dirt.
A close-up shot of a grey seagull with its mouth stretched wide to swallow a large, bumpy purple starfish.
A reddish-orange velvet worm clings to a thin green stem while clutching a dark brown butterfly, set against a soft, out-of-focus background.
A reddish-brown velvet worm crawls through blades of green grass on a moss-covered forest floor next to a fallen yellow leaf.
Dark brown, feathery seaweed drapes over wet tide pool rocks covered in pink algae and smooth, rounded pebbles.
Wet, dark brown feather boa kelp is draped over rocky intertidal terrain, surrounded by smooth pebbles and pinkish coralline algae.
A close-up view of wet, dark brown feather boa kelp draped over intertidal rocks and smooth, rounded pebbles.
Wet, dark brown feather boa kelp is draped over slick, colorful intertidal rocks and smooth pebbles.
A seagull stands on a dark wooden dock, looking down at a small starfish on the ground.
Thick, dark feather boa kelp lies draped over wet, algae-encrusted rocks and smooth grey pebbles in an intertidal zone.
Wet, dark brown seaweed with long, textured fronds lies draped across colorful tide pool rocks and smooth, rounded pebbles.
